user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Rolex
Product type: Submariner luxury dive watch
Tone: luxurious, precise, adventurous
Visual style: Clean, high-contrast imagery highlighting the watch's craftsmanship and rugged elegance against oceanic and urban backdrops.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling combined with aspirational lifestyle portrayal
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Clean, high-contrast imagery highlighting the watch's craftsmanship and rugged elegance against oceanic and urban backdrops.
brief.conceptual_technique: Heritage storytelling combined with aspirational lifestyle portrayal
brief.headline: Master Every Depth, Own Every Moment
brief.subheadline: The Rolex Submariner – where timeless craftsmanship meets bold adventure.
brief.body_copy: Rooted in a legacy of precision and designed for the daring, the Submariner is the ultimate symbol of elegance beneath the surface and confidence above. Whether exploring ocean depths or navigating city lights, this iconic dive watch is your companion in every journey.

visual_direction.primary_image: Close-up shot of the Rolex Submariner showing intricate details of the dial, bezel, and bracelet with water droplets on the surface, emphasizing craftsmanship and ruggedness.

background.description: A high-contrast underwater scene with sun rays penetrating deep blue water, showcasing the adventurous spirit of the watch.
A sleek nighttime city skyline with illuminated skyscrapers, reflecting the watch’s versatility and elegance in an urban setting.

visual_direction.color_palette: Deep blues, blacks, and metallic silvers with subtle green accents reflecting the Submariner’s signature bezel.
visual_direction.typography: Sophisticated serif for headline and subheadline; clean sans-serif for body copy and call to action.
visual_direction.layout: Balanced composition with the watch prominently centered, oceanic backdrop on the left blending seamlessly into the urban skyline on the right, creating a journey from sea to city.
